headline: This Oil Shock Is So Big It Is Fueling a Turnaround in Energy Stocks
summary: Wall Street is bracing for a longer-term disruption from the war with Iran, and loading up on shares of oil-and-gas producers that have lagged behind in recent years.

raw.headline: This Oil Shock Is So Big It Is Fueling a Turnaround in Energy Stocks
raw.summary: Wall Street is bracing for a longer-term disruption from the war with Iran, and loading up on shares of oil-and-gas producers that have lagged behind in recent years.

headline: The cost to fly private is up as much as 20% with fuel prices soaring
summary: Deep-pocketed travelers are less likely to get priced out as airfares rise, but they have to navigate unexpected fees related to the Iran war and rising fuel costs.

raw.headline: The cost to fly private is up as much as 20% with fuel prices soaring
